# The Roofing Friend

> Veteran-owned premium metal roofing contractor serving the entire San Francisco Bay Area. We install standing seam, R-Panel, Multi-V, TPO, copper, and zinc roof systems on residential, commercial, and historic-landmark properties. Licensed CA #1067709, fully insured, 24/7 emergency service.

## Site

- Website: https://theroof.info
- Phone: (415) 697-1849
- Email: info@theroof.info
- License: California State License Board #1067709
- Service area: San Francisco Bay Area (San Francisco, Alameda, Contra Costa, Marin, Santa Clara, Sonoma, Santa Cruz, Stanislaus counties)

## Core services

- Standing seam metal roofing (snap-lock, mechanical seam, copper, zinc)
- R-Panel metal roofing
- Multi-V metal roofing
- TPO single-ply membrane roofing
- Insulated Metal Panels (IMP)
- Retrofit-over-existing roof systems
- Historic-district and landmark roof restoration
- 24/7 emergency tarp and leak repair
- Permit handling and HOA / design-review submissions

- [Home](https://theroof.info/)
- [Commercial Roofing](https://theroof.info/commercial-roofing)

- [Rebates](https://theroof.info/rebates)

- [Contact](https://theroof.info/contact)

## Service areas

City hubs and affluent neighborhood pages are listed in the [sitemap](https://theroof.info/sitemap.xml). Top-tier service areas include San Francisco (Pacific Heights, Sea Cliff, Presidio Heights), Tiburon, Kentfield, Los Gatos, Walnut Creek, Santa Rosa, and Santa Clara.

## Differentiators

- Veteran-owned, government and GSA contract eligible
- W-2 in-house crews — never subcontracted
- 30-year PVDF paint warranty, 40-year weathertightness warranty
- Title 24 cool-roof compliant; PG&E rebate handling included
- Class A fire rating (highest available) for WUI / wildfire zones
- Free Bay Area panel delivery from in-house roll-forming shop

## Crawl policy

All AI crawlers (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, Applebot-Extended, CCBot, etc.) are explicitly permitted to crawl, index, train on, and cite this site. See robots.txt for the full allow list.
